Name: Save Octopus Output Variable With Scoping
Description: Saves an [output variable](https://octopus.com/docs/deploying-applications/variables/output-variables) to the given project / library variable set with scoping

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ApiKey
Parameters.Label: API Key
Parameters.HelpText: Provide an Octopus API Key with appropriate permissions to save the variable

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_VariableName
Parameters.Label: Variable Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the [variable used when it was set](https://octopus.com/docs/deploying-applications/variables/output-variables#Outputvariables-Settingoutputvariablesusingscripts)

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_VariableSetType
Parameters.Label: Variable Set Type
Parameters.HelpText: If the output variable is being saved to a project or [library variable set](https://octopus.com/docs/deploying-applications/variables/library-variable-sets)

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_VariableSetName
Parameters.Label: Variable Set Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the project or [library](https://octopus.com/docs/deploying-applications/variables/library-variable-sets) variable set where the output variable should be saved

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_TargetName
Parameters.Label: Target Variable Name
Parameters.HelpText:
The name to use when saving the variable.

_Note: The original variable name the default value._

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_IsSensitive
Parameters.Label: Is Sensitive?
Parameters.HelpText: If the variable should be marked as [sensitive](https://octopus.com/docs/deploying-applications/variables/sensitive-variables) and the value masked from logs

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_EnvironmentScope
Parameters.Label: Environment Scope
Parameters.HelpText:
The environment scope to use when creating or updating the variable.

_This can be a list delimited by the Scope Delimiter (, by default)_

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_RoleScope
Parameters.Label: Role Scope
Parameters.HelpText:
The role scope to use when creating or updating the variable.

_This can be a list delimited by the Scope Delimiter (, by default)_

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_MachineScope
Parameters.Label: Target Scope
Parameters.HelpText:
The target scope to use when creating or updating the variable.

_This can be a list delimited by the Scope Delimiter (, by default)_

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ActionScope
Parameters.Label: Action Scope
Parameters.HelpText:
The action scope to use when creating or updating the variable.

_This can be a list delimited by the Scope Delimiter (, by default)_

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ChannelScope
Parameters.Label: Channel Scope
Parameters.HelpText:
The channel scope to use when creating or updating the variable.

_This can be a list delimited by the Scope Delimiter (, by default)_

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_TenantTagScope
Parameters.Label: Tenant Tag Scope
Parameters.HelpText:
The tenant tag scope to use when creating or updating the variable. The value should be in the format TagSetName/TagValue.

_This can be a list delimited by the Scope Delimiter (, by default)_

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ScopeDelimiter
Parameters.Label: Scope Delimiter
Parameters.HelpText: The delimiter used by scope lists.
